scripts.build: rm -f wc-payment-monitor.zip && mkdir -p ../temp/wc-payment-monitor && cp -r . ../temp/wc-payment-monitor/ && rm -f ../temp/wc-payment-monitor/wc-payment-monitor.zip && cd ../temp && zip -r ../sentinel/wc-payment-monitor.zip wc-payment-monitor -x "wc-payment-monitor/tests/*" "wc-payment-monitor/vendor/*" "wc-payment-monitor/.*" "wc-payment-monitor/Makefile" "wc-payment-monitor/docker-compose.yml" "wc-payment-monitor/Dockerfile.tests" "wc-payment-monitor/*.md" "wc-payment-monitor/phpcs.xml" "wc-payment-monitor/phpmd.xml" "wc-payment-monitor/phpstan.neon" "wc-payment-monitor/phpunit.xml" "wc-payment-monitor/codeception.yml" "wc-payment-monitor/run-tests.sh" "wc-payment-monitor/install-wp-tests.sh" "wc-payment-monitor/composer.*" "wc-payment-monitor/docs/*" "wc-payment-monitor/examples/*" "wc-payment-monitor/package.json" "wc-payment-monitor/*.cache" "wc-payment-monitor/*.zip" && cd ../sentinel && rm -rf ../temp
